violations.text: Turkey, chicken, ham, broccoli, brussels sprouts, and cauliflower observed held at 46-48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were voluntarily disposed of by PIC. Discussed not overfilling the refrigerators to allow air circulation, and not placing items into the refrigerators until it was 41 degrees F or below. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
Numerous food containers have an accumulation of paper and adhesive. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
The ceiling light near the dry storage room was not functional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
Wood cutting board on the line observed not in good repair, with a crack running through it. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
The dumpster area has an accumulation of leaf litter. Dumpster areas must be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The walls in the mop room are in poor repair, constructed on 2 sides by drywall, with the painted blocks on the third wall peeling. There is also a drainage pipe of unknown origin coming out of the wall to drain into the mop sink. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
